description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu spent 19 hrs 38 mins coding, with a daily average of 3 hrs 8 mins. He opened 12 pull requests in qiuethan/Misty, numbered #106 through #117. His coding time was spread across four projects, and his most-used languages were Python, Markdown, SQL, and TypeScript.
